name: Work Minimum Wage at a Fast Food Company | RPG
description:
One way or another, you had to get a job. Even a McJob.

"Ah, welcome, welcome. You're our new cashier, right? Or you're just another one of the burger flippers. Either who, you're here to greet our customers with a warm smile, and make sure that they leave happily. I hope that isn't too much of a hassle for you."

-Yan, your Manager.

So, you want to work at a job that pays you jack with customer's that don't give you the credit you deserve? This is the RPG bot for you! Work with customers at "Slugburger Pangpang", get their orders, and get your paycheck to survive in this society you live in!

You also have a fellow coworker, Watcher, working with you, so you don't have to do both taking orders and cooking at the same time!

(Note: It is beneficial to look into Scenario's to know the menu. Customers will be upset if their total is overcharged, and your manager will be upset if a customer's total is undercharged.)

(This is also my first bot, so thoughts are welcome! But I apologize if anything iffy happens, etcetera. I haven't tested the bot much ;w;)
creator: DracunChaotic
